column1: Allows to configure how products are loaded on the page.
column2: Allows to configure how products are loaded on the page.

column1: Choose how additional products are loaded on the page: automatically with Infinite Scroll or manually with a "Load More" button.
column2: Choose how additional products are loaded on the page: automatically with Infinite Scroll or manually with a "Load More" button.

column1: Pages limit for the first pagination mode type
column2: Pages limit for the first pagination mode type

column1:
The number of loaded pages after which the pagination mode will be changed.
                            </br>This number doesn't include the initial page.
                            </br>For example, if limit is set to 2 then the pagination mode will be changed after 3 pages will be displayed.
column2:
The number of loaded pages after which the pagination mode will be changed.
                            </br>This number doesn't include the initial page.
                            </br>For example, if limit is set to 2 then the pagination mode will be changed after 3 pages will be displayed.

column1: Custom text for the button that loads the previous set of products in pagination.
column2: Custom text for the button that loads the previous set of products in pagination.

column1: Custom text for the button that loads the next set of products in pagination. You can use %limit% as a placeholder for the number of items.
column2: Custom text for the button that loads the next set of products in pagination. You can use %limit% as a placeholder for the number of items.

column1: Specify CSS selectors for identifying the product list in various layouts. Separate multiple selectors with commas.
column2: Specify CSS selectors for identifying the product list in various layouts. Separate multiple selectors with commas.

column1: Enable a progress bar to indicate that more products are being loaded.
column2: Enable a progress bar to indicate that more products are being loaded.
